inputs.prompt:
A cute corgi dog sitting in the cockpit of a small airplane, wearing an aviator helmet and goggles, confidently piloting the aircraft.

The corgi’s paws rest on the control yoke, ears slightly fluttering with the airflow, expression focused yet adorable.

The airplane flies smoothly above soft white clouds, with blue sky and sunlight filling the background.

Gentle cockpit instrument lights glow subtly, adding a realistic aviation detail.

Smooth cinematic camera movement, alternating between interior cockpit close-ups and exterior wide shots of the plane in flight.

Bright and clean color palette, warm sunlight and soft shadows, joyful and adventurous atmosphere.

Cinematic animated realism style with light anthropomorphic charm, highly detailed textures and natural lighting.

High resolution, smooth motion, professional color grading.

No text, no logos, no watermarks.
